criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: Presence and quality of AI-driven tools for tasks like object removal, image enhancement, style transfer, background replacement, and intelligent adjustments.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use, intuitiveness of the interface, and overall user-friendliness for both beginners and professionals.

criteria.name: Editing Capabilities
criteria.description: Variety and effectiveness of editing tools, including basic adjustments (lighting, color correction) and advanced features (layering, masking).

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app on different platforms (iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, Web) to cater to a wider user base.

criteria.name: Pricing and Accessibility
criteria.description: Cost of the app (free, subscription-based, one-time purchase) and availability of a free tier or trial for users to test the features.

criteria.name: Video Editing Capabilities
criteria.description: Tools that use AI to create videos from prompts, speed up the editing process, and create templates.
